speaker: DUKE
text: These letters at fit time deliver me.

speaker: DUKE
text: The Provost knows our purpose and our plot.

speaker: DUKE
text: The matter being afoot, keep your instruction

speaker: DUKE
text: And hold you ever to our special drift,

speaker: DUKE
text: Though sometimes you do blench from this to that

speaker: DUKE
text: As cause doth minister. Go call at Flavius’ house

speaker: DUKE
text: And tell him where I stay. Give the like notice

speaker: DUKE
text: To Valencius, Rowland, and to Crassus,

speaker: DUKE
text: And bid them bring the trumpets to the gate.

speaker: DUKE
text: I thank thee, Varrius. Thou hast made good haste.

speaker: DUKE
text: Come, we will walk. There’s other of our friends

speaker: DUKE
text: Will greet us here anon. My gentle Varrius.
